item.title: ‘I will always be part of the royal family,’ Prince Harry said during whirlwind tour
item.description: Prince Harry says during a visit to Ukraine he is ‘doing the very thing that I was born to do’.

item.title: Mounjaro, diabetes and weight loss drug, won't be listed on PBS after negotiations collapse
item.description: Around 450,000 Australians will continue paying hundreds of dollars a month for their medication.

item.title: Pat Cummins cops rude welcome back to cricket from 15-year-old prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
item.description: The Australian got the last laugh over his ‘new favourite player’ in his first match since the Ashes.

item.title: Grand slam champion Iga Swiatek reduced to tears as ‘sad’ health battle forces Madrid Open retirement
item.description: ‘There is something going on’ and it’s taken down a key player just weeks out from the French Open.

item.title: Ronan Androgenic: Brisbane looksmaxxing influencer arrested during livestream
item.description: Ronan Androgenic has become a rising star among a generation increasingly obsessed with extreme beauty improvement.

item.title: Sam Neill reveals cancer battle and fight for life-saving treatment access
item.description: The Jurassic Park star is on a mission to help Australians access the treatment that gave him a second chance.

item.title: New washing machines to feature dual start function for child safety
item.description: The change follows a fatal accident in New Zealand in 2021.

item.title: Seasonal depression: The yearly blues hitting Australians as the temperature cools
item.description: Thousands of Australians are impacted as the mercury drops every year.

item.title: Fresh uncertainty surrounds Sam Kerr’s Chelsea future after new comments from coach Sonia Bompastor
item.description: ‘Sam deserves what’s happening to her.’

item.title: Magda Szubanski unwittingly becomes face of online health scam amid cancer remission
item.description: ‘She’s being used just like me.’

item.title: Natalie Bassingthwaighte reveals how she prepared for her most ‘brutal’ challenge yet on SAS: AUS V ENG
item.description: ‘It’s very intimidating and can feel really scary.’

item.title: St Kilda coach Ross Lyon issues emotional apology for ‘casual racism’ comment at training
item.description: The coach offered to consider his position after hurting his Indigenous players with the remark.

item.title: Carlton club doctor Matt Chamberlain takes leave amid Elijah Hollands investigation
item.description: The respected medical professional is also considering his legal options as the investigation continues.

item.title: Sydney family’s heartbreaking warning to women after high-achieving mother-of-three dies weeks after giving birth
item.description: ‘As a mother, you put everybody else in front of yourself ... Don’t dismiss even the smallest symptoms.’

item.title: Pre-dawn Russian drone attack on Odesa in Ukraine wounds 14
item.description: The drones hit residential neighbourhoods and civilian infrastructure in a key Black Sea port city.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Iran offers plan to open Strait of Hormuz if the US ends blockade but Trump’s nuclear demands go unanswered
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Aussie veteran Josh Hazlewood produces bowling masterpiece in IPL win over Delhi Capitals
item.description: The 35-year-old has continued his hot form since returning from injury.

item.title: King Charles and Queen Camilla US tour: The royals welcomed by US President Donald Trump to begin the four-day visit
item.description: Their arrival comes as much of the capital remains on edge in the wake of Saturday’s White House shooting.

item.title: How Victoria’s 20 per cent car registration rebate will work and how much you can save
item.description: Motorists have two months to apply for the rebate before it closes. Here is everything you need to know.

item.title: One Direction singer Harry Styles and actress Zoë Kravitz are engaged
item.description: The pair first sparked engagement speculation after Kravitz was spotted wearing a huge diamond ring on her wedding finger.

item.title: My Reno Rules: Emma & Michelle and Julia & Nathan go head-to-head amid accusations of idea stealing
item.description: ‘We tried to stay unique and now there’s nothing to show for it.’

item.title: King Charles to promote UK-US unity in rare speech to Congress during four-day state trip
item.description: The address will be only the second by a British sovereign to the US Congress.

item.title: Family of Finnish construction worker killed in Brisbane scaffolding accident demand answers
item.description: ‘Nobody should go to work and never come back.’

item.title: Middle East war live updates: King Charles’ speech to US lawmakers addresses war on the 250th independence anniversary
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: US to issue passports featuring Donald Trump’s picture to commemorate America’s 250th anniversary
item.description: Trump’s face and his signature in gold will appear on the inside cover.

item.title: One Nation leader Pauline Hanson brags about ‘amazing’ new private plane and millions in donations
item.description: ‘I cannot thank you enough for the hope and encouragement.’

item.title: The Agenda Setters stocks after R7: Buy, hold and sell
item.description: ‘That is not what they brought.’

item.title: Would you eat this? Woolworths shoppers divided over marked-down pack of grey-toned mince
item.description: From ‘already rotten’ to ‘still safe to eat’, the off-colour mince has sparked a beef online.

item.title: Socceroos star Jackson Irvine slams FIFA giving inaugural peace prize to President Trump: ‘Mockery’
item.description: ‘Decisions like that feel like they just set us back.’

item.title: ‘Super f....d up’: Joe Rogan takes aim at Australia’s government again on controversial podcast
item.description: ‘Australia is such a crazy place, man.’

item.title: Man charged after alleged tiny home theft stopped by ‘hero’ locals in citizen’s arrest in Bli Bli, Sunshine Coast
item.description: Two men trained in martial arts stepped in until police arrived.

item.description: ‘It is in the wrong place, at the wrong time, for too long.’

item.title: New advice on catch-up moves to start building wealth in your 40s, 50s and beyond
item.description: ‘It’s never too late.’

item.title: Four minutes of daily movement could help prevent type 2 diabetes, study finds
item.description: A new study reveals the surprisingly simple daily habit that could slash your risk of type 2 diabetes by more than a third.

item.title: Prince and Princess of Wales William and Kate share family photo to mark 15th wedding anniversary
item.description: The Prince and Princess of Wales have marked their 15th wedding anniversary.

item.title: Ripper GC general manager Nick Adams debunks ‘panic’ myth surrounding future of LIV Golf
item.description: ‘That’s the only information I have at this stage.’

item.description: ‘King George never set foot in America and, please rest assured, I am not here as part of some cunning rearguard action.’

item.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said ‘attacks on our Jewish community are attacks on Britain’.

item.description: The Lions co-captain still recalls the three questions he was asked by the first-time coach.

item.description: Players are set to be informed of the situation this week.

item.title: OceanGate widow given shoeboxes of dead husband and son’s ‘slush’ after tragedy
item.description: Nine months after the tragedy, two small boxes were given to the widow and mother.

item.description: Fifteen innocent people were killed in Australia’s worst terror attack.

item.description: The controversy began when the snowboarder’s wife said she wanted to go on a girls’ trip.

item.title: Cathy MacGuinness: Husband’s heartbreaking tribute to Sydney mother-of-three who died weeks after giving birth
item.description: The 40-year-old died of cardiac arrest linked to an undiagnosed heart condition, prompting a warning to women.

item.title: Much-loved Queensland jockey Shane McGovern undergoes second leg amputation in ‘devastating’ update
item.description: The ‘tough as nails’ Aussie faces a long recovery after getting trapped under his horse in a freak accident.

item.description: No charges have been laid.

item.title: Toxic black mould fears put Queensland’s Logan Police Station at risk of shutdown, with officers relocated amid health concerns
item.description: Two officers fell ill and one later died, with his family alleging mould exposure was the cause.

item.title: Family’s desperate plea as four-year-old Western Sydney girl loses most of her hair to alopecia
item.description: ‘She wants to know why… why is she losing her hair, why does it have to be her that’s going bald?’

item.description: ‘This place totally saved my life.’

item.description: Police claim the 22-year-old made off with more than 900 litres of diesel in large drums and jerry cans.

item.description: Filling up has become their most dangerous act.

item.description: The Blues overpowered a Queensland side battling on after losing two players to head injury assessments.

item.description: Rioters looking for ‘payback’ clashed with police, who were accused of protecting a suspected killer.

item.description: ‘Everyone is feeling very upset and emotions are very high.’

item.title: China suspends robotaxi permits after mass outage
item.description: Around 100 autonomous cars were stranded for hours in Wuhan, China, prompting a nationwide pause on new approvals and a ban for one company.

item.description: The 36-year-old claims he believed the 13-year-old was over the age of consent when they had sex in a car park toilet.

item.description: The fruit of GWM's Australian-led efforts to improve the ride and handling of its vehicles will be enjoyed by other markets as well.

item.description: Early-bird discounts for the first 100 customers may not be enough to make Suzuki’s first electric SUV price-competitive with rivals.

item.description: Optus remains on top for NBN speeds, but the ACCC’s latest report shows a lower‑profile budget telco has quietly climbed into second place.

item.description: The highest point was about 4m off the ground.

item.description: The reigniting of the feud comes after remarks about the First Lady sparked backlash.

item.description: The much loved medical veteran is out for at least next week’s game with two hamstring injuries.

item.description: Travellers will see less flight options within Australia until almost the end of the year.

item.description: The major rescue operation was launched when the worker was reported missing last night.

item.description: First Toyota, now Kia. The Seltos is the Korean brand's first model to go hybrid-only in Australia, despite multiple powertrains available overseas.

item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.
